title: Cheezies Gourmet
tagline: Website and ordering system for a gourmet mac & cheese food truck.
description: A custom website and lightweight online ordering system built for Cheezies Gourmet — a real food truck. Features a menu browser, order-ahead form, social integration, and a simple admin panel for the owner to update specials.
story: Built for a real food truck owner who was taking orders via DMs on Instagram. The goal was a professional web presence that required zero technical knowledge to maintain — the owner updates the menu from their phone.
forWho: The Cheezies Gourmet team and their customers — a real-world deployment, not a demo.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Static Astro site with Netlify Forms for order submission. Menu data stored in a JSON file editable by the owner. No backend — zero maintenance cost.
keyPatterns: Netlify Forms for serverless form handling
CMS-lite: owner edits a single JSON file to update the menu
Mobile-first layout optimized for customers ordering on phones
